title: 10" Portion Control Plate for Balanced Eating - Healthy Nutrition Plate for Adults and Teens - Melamine Dividers, Weight Loss（1 Piece
features: Healthy Diet Guidance: this bariatric portion control plate serves as a visual guide for the flexible way to eat, and is designed for easy food portion control for weight loss, helping teach proper nutrition sections and balanced meals, which will enable you to achieve healthy and sustained weight loss

Engaging Design: The beautiful design of our plates grabs their attention and encourages them to participate in placing food on their plates. The portion control container is divided into 3 sections, and each food compartment visually reflects the appropriate ratio of protein, vegetables, and carbohydrates.

Reassuring Quality: bariatric plate is made of quality material, safe,reliable, reusable, clear printed, lightweight and not easy to break or fade, offering you long time application; Do not put it in microwave or oven or other heating appliances

Suitable Measurement: portion control containers measure approx. 24.5 cm/ 10inches in diameter, the proper size makes divided portion plate suitable for most adults who want to lose weight for daily use, practical and convenient

Heartwarming Gift: these portion control plates for bariatric patients are ideal gifts to share with your friends, family members, neighbors, colleagues, weight loss adults, which can help improve weight related chronic diseases
description: Features: These portion plates for weight loss are printed with cute food patterns and paired with encouraging warm words which can give you more courage to insist on your weight loose plan. Meal portion control plate can help you control portion sizes, so knowing how to lose weight becomes easy. Specifications: Material: melamine Color: as the picture shown Size: approx. 24.5 cm in diameter Notes: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The color may exist a slight difference due to different screen displays.
